description_long: This is a metallic combination wrench featuring an open-ended jaw on one side and a closed, ring-shaped box end on the other. The body is elongated and slender, with a slight taper from the open end to the box end, and a smooth, slightly reflective surface typical of polished steel. The open end is U-shaped, designed to grip hexagonal nuts or bolts, while the box end has internal grooves for a secure fit on fasteners. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, and the handle is straight with a uniform cross-section. The wrench appears to be in excellent condition, with no visible rust, wear, or damage. Its utilitarian design is suited for mechanical tasks in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings.
description: A polished metal combination wrench with an open end and a closed, grooved box end. The tool is sleek, straight, and in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wrench, with the open end at the top and the box end at the bottom.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thin profile and the depth of both the open and box ends.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wrench, mirroring the front but with less detail on the jaw openings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the slim profile and the contours of the ends.
